title: SQL: cast(now() as date) in default fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, d DATE DEFAULT (DATE('now')), name TEXT);
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, d DATE DEFAULT NULL, description TEXT);
SELECT * FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
key_bug_features: default value using cast(now() as date)
